query: Review the generated documentation site in `dist/docs/html/index.html` for UX and visual quality.
baseline_gaps: Agent may give generic aesthetic feedback without evidence.
expected_behavior: Assesses user intent, hierarchy, visual rhythm, accessibility, and responsive behavior.
Requests or captures screenshots/browser evidence when possible.
Ranks the top issues by user impact.
expected_skill_contribution: The UI/UX skill should produce a user-impact-ranked review with evidence for hierarchy, visual quality, accessibility, and responsive behavior.
fixture_intent: Normal scenario for `ui-ux-quality`: exercises behavior the skill is expected to improve over baseline.

query: Review the docs navigation and contributor discovery path for installing the harness. Focus on information architecture, navigation labels, keyboard/focus behavior for navigation, and accessible names; do not perform a broad visual audit.
baseline_gaps: Agent may ignore keyboard and screen-reader behavior.
Agent may miss navigation states and content discovery states.
expected_behavior: Checks navigation labels, information scent, focus order for navigation, keyboard behavior, and accessible names.
Separates accessibility blockers from content/discovery polish.
Provides reproduction steps or exact locations for issues.
expected_skill_contribution: The UI/UX skill should focus on navigation and contributor discovery, separating accessibility blockers from content/discovery polish with concrete locations or reproduction steps.
fixture_intent: Difficult scenario for `ui-ux-quality`: exercises behavior the skill is expected to improve over baseline.

query: Evaluate the documentation site's CSS and layout tokens in `docs/assets/site.css` as a design-system surface.
baseline_gaps: Agent may review only visual appearance.
Agent may ignore design-system consistency and regression risk.
expected_behavior: Checks tokens, variants, layout patterns, theming, docs consistency, accessibility states, and regression risk.
Creates or proposes Beads follow-ups for product work.
expected_skill_contribution: The UI/UX skill should evaluate CSS/layout tokens as a design-system surface, separate blockers from recommendations, and propose Beads follow-ups for product/design-system work.
fixture_intent: Very Difficult scenario for `ui-ux-quality`: exercises behavior the skill is expected to improve over baseline.
